purpose: Local-only Python repository hygiene hints for agents and maintainers.
safe_start: Inspect pyproject.toml and committed config before choosing commands.
Prefer existing repo commands and wrappers over global Python tooling assumptions.
Do not create virtual environments, install dependencies, or rewrite lockfiles unless the human explicitly asks.

command_hints.name: pytest
command_hints.when: pytest is already configured and dependencies are already available

command_hints.name: unittest
command_hints.when: the repo uses stdlib unittest or has no pytest dependency evidence

command_hints.name: ruff-check
command_hints.when: ruff is already configured and available

non_goals: No package publishing or build backend selection.
